contentBlocks.original:
ॐ पूर्णमदः पूर्णमिदं पूर्णात् पूर्णमुदच्यते
पूर्णस्य पूर्णमादाय पूर्णमेवावशिष्यते
ॐ शान्तिः शान्तिः शान्तिः
contentBlocks.transliteration:
oṃ pūrṇamadaḥ pūrṇamidaṃ pūrṇāt pūrṇamudacyate
pūrṇasya pūrṇamādāya pūrṇamevāvaśiṣyate
oṃ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ śāntiḥ
contentBlocks.translation:
Om. Wholeness is That, Wholeness is This. From the Whole, the Whole comes forth.
Removing the Whole from the Whole, the Whole remains.
Om, peace, peace, peace.
contentBlocks.meanings: ॐ (oṃ) – Om; पूर्णमदः (pūrṇamadaḥ) – Wholeness is That (pūrṇa:wholeness | adaḥ:that); पूर्णमिदं (pūrṇamidaṃ) – Wholeness is This (pūrṇa:wholeness | idam:this); पूर्णात् (pūrṇāt) – from the Whole; पूर्णमुदच्यते (pūrṇamudacyate) – the Whole comes forth (pūrṇa:whole | udacyate:comes forth); पूर्णस्य (pūrṇasya) – of the Whole; पूर्णमादाय (pūrṇamādāya) – removing the Whole (pūrṇa:whole | ādāya:removing); पूर्णमेव (pūrṇameva) – the Whole remains (pūrṇa:whole | eva:indeed/remains); अवशिष्यते (avaśiṣyate) – remains; ॐ (oṃ) – Om; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace; शान्तिः (śāntiḥ) – peace;
